Accepted Payment MethodsCryptocurrency, Third party payment providers, SEPA Bank transfers.
Device Compatibility Mobile and desktop.
Geographic Restrictions MEXC is unavailable in North Korea, Cuba, Sudan, Syria, Iran, Crimea, Mainland China, Indonesia, Singapore, Venezuela, the United States, and Canada.

What is the Pros of MEXC?

As a famous crypto exchange, MEXC is standing out by providing many perks to their users, the pros of MEXC exchange are:

  • Largest Collections of Altcoins: MEXC is popular for listing new altcoins and meme coins for investing and spot and futures trading. The cryptocurrency exchange has more digital assets than any other exchange in the crypto industry (with over 2700 supported crypto and 3000+ trading pairs)
  • Quick Registration: You can complete MEXC registration in under a minute. This is because you only need an email or a phone number to register and access MEXC trading services.
  • Optional KYC: Once you add the verification code sent to your email, you are in, and you can start trading immediately. You do not need to complete the KYC verification to be able to withdraw your digital assets.

Without KYC, you can withdraw between 10-30 BTC daily, which is more than enough for many individual traders. However, you can always complete the KYC verification process to boost your withdrawal limit to 80 or 200 BTC as your needs grow.

  • Copy trading Tools: This platform helps new users make the most of their investments by copying the trading strategies of experienced traders. You get access to important details about the trader, including their track record, return on investments, and wins. If you like any traders’ track records, you can simply click “Copy Trade,” and orders will be automatically placed on your behalf.
  • Futures Demo Trading: If you are worried about risking your money on crypto trades, you can use the Demo Trading interface to practice before you start. When you sign up for demo trading, you will receive a $50,000 test account that gives you a simple, risk-free way to try futures trading and other trading options on MEXC Exchange.
  • Earning Options: Users can stake their assets through Savings, Simple Earn, and New Token Mining with fixed and flexible terms in exchange for rewards. This is especially important for users looking to grow assets with minimal daily trading on the spots or futures markets.

With Savings, you will get daily interest payouts between 0.08% – 20% annual percentage yield (APY). On the flip side, you can also use MEXC Loans to borrow crypto by putting up another crypto asset as collateral.

What is the Cons of MEXC?

The cons of MEXC Exchange are;

  • The Exchange is Largely Unregulated: MEXC cryptocurrency exchange is not regulated in many countries as it lacks authorization from financial authorities in several jurisdictions, including the US, Canada, and Germany. In Germany, BaFin has warned that MEXC global exchange is offering financial services without the necessary licenses.
  • Complaints About Locking User Funds: MEXC has been facing backlash for claims of locking user funds even though the experience is not consistent across multiple users. A MEXC review on Trustpilot said, “Used the platform for one month, made security deposits and deposited crypto funds. Out of nowhere got banned with no reasons and explanation. Another user said, “They have sent me an Email to withdraw your assets within a short period of time, but my assets are frozen (cannot sell and exchange them for other cryptos) and can not withdraw because XCH (chia network) has been in maintenance mode for months so i can not withdraw my XCH….”
  • Not the Most Beginner Friendly Platforms: Due to its large coin offerings and many other features, trading on MEXC might be a little challenging for beginners. However, the platform provides educational resources and a simple in-app guide to help new users.

What Are the Best Features of MEXC

The best features of MEXC are the Launchpad and Kickstarter, MEXC Futures M-Day, Spot Trading, and Copy Trading. Let’s break down these features to get a better understanding of how they impact your experience on the exchange:

1. MEXC Launchpad & Kickstarter

It can be challenging to discover and invest in promising Blockchain projects before they hit the mainstream. The MEXC global exchange offers two key features to improve the process: the MEXC Launchpad and the Kickstarter event.

They are designed to help users discover and invest in promising blockchain projects while providing incentives such as airdrops and rewards to encourage participants.

For the MEXC Launchpad, the exchange uses a rigorous selection process to ensure that only projects that meet strict criteria are featured. This includes evaluating the project’s team, market demand, and potential.

Users can earn free token airdrops by holding MX tokens. For instance, if you hold at least 2,000 MX tokens, you can participate in airdrop events and make huge returns when projects launch. 

To participate in Launchpad events:

  • Buy and hold at least 1,000 MX tokens in your spot wallet for 30 consecutive days.
  • Commit your MX tokens during Non-lockup Events using the Quick Commit feature.
  • Airdrops will then be distributed based on the proportion of tokens committed.

On the other hand, the Kickstarter event is another initiative by MEXC platform that aims to support new projects during their pre-launch phase. You and other users can participate by voting for your favorite Blockchain projects. Successful votes lead to free rewards and token airdrops for participants.

Like the Launchpad, there are requirements that qualify users to participate in Kickstarter events. Users must hold at least 500 MX tokens for 24 hours before the event starts. The amount of MX tokens held determines how many tokens can be committed during the event.

2. MEXC Futures M-Day

MEXC Futures M-Day is a promotional event designed to encourage users to participate in special token listing events. Users can receive airdrops as rewards by trading in the particular stock designated by MEXC.

This event is held all year round, but the tokens change depending on the time of year, so if you want to participate, you must watch the event often. For instance, MEXC held an event last year to encourage users to trade in USDT-M futures on the cryptocurrency exchange.

Participants earned rewards through a lucky draw based on their trading volumes during specified periods. This threshold varies by event; for instance, it could be set at 40,000 USDT or more.

The higher the transaction volume, the more tickets a user can claim for the draw. Here’s how you can qualify to participate;

  • You must register for each event to participate on the MEXC website or mobile app.
  • Engage in trading the particular token in the futures market to accumulate volume and earn tickets.
  • During the ticket claim period, claim your tickets based on your trading activity.
  • After the event concludes, MEXC will announce the results and distribute rewards.

Participating in MEXC M-Day can get you rewards whether you win or not. Participation alone gets you free raffle tickets with futures bonuses. One lottery ticket will be awarded for every 45,000 USDT trading volume, which you can use as a margin and withdraw your earnings.

3. Spot Trading

The MEXC platform has a spot market similar to other exchanges. You can buy and sell crypto easily and take advantage of MEXC’s high liquidity. Due to a high trading volume, your orders will be fulfilled quickly, and you can get good rates when making trades. 

Additionally, the platform has an advanced trading dashboard with pairs mostly pegged with USDT. The dashboard displays trading information, including the 24-hour, 7-day, and 30-day trading volume of the particular pair you choose.

4. Copy Trading

MEXC’s Copy Trading feature allows new users to automatically replicate the trading strategies of experienced traders in futures markets. You can select active traders based on their track record and performance metrics, such as return on investment (ROI), 7-day win rate, and profit and loss (PNL).

To participate, you only need to deposit funds to your copy trade account, fill in your details, and follow experienced traders to start copying their trading strategies. All orders are placed automatically when you decide to follow a trader, and no additional fees are charged for copy trading transactions.

Other MEXC Crypto Exchange Features

  • P2P Trading: Besides buying, selling, and trading crypto in the futures and spot markets, MEXC users can also trade crypto assets with other users on the MEXC platform without middlemen. In exchange for a local currency or vice versa, you can trade digital assets on the P2P marketplace, including USDT, USDC, BTC, and ETH.
  • MEXC Token Airdrops: MEXC frequently hosts token airdrops, letting you earn rewards by completing simple tasks like depositing funds or making trades. If you want to participate in airdrop campaigns, you should check the “Token Airdrop” page often to catch such events before they end.
  • MEXC Referral Program: Like other exchanges, MEXC affiliate portal enables users to make additional rewards by promoting the platform. As a referrer, you can earn up to 70% commission on every trade your referrals make on MEXC’s spot and futures markets.

These rewards are not one-way benefits; referrals also qualify for rewards, such as a $20 sign up bonus, and access to top industry events. So, if you’d rather open an account and trade daily without being an affiliate, use the promo code: mexc-cnjreview for exclusive rewards and airdrops.

What is Trading fees on MEXC?

The trading fees on MEXC is low, placing it above Binance and other exchanges in terms of low fees. Below is a breakdown of the fees MEXC charges for spot, futures, and margin trading.

Spot Trading Fees

MEXC’s spot transaction fees are 0.05% for both makers and takers. However, there are a few ways to reduce these fees: 

  • MX Deduction: Use MEXC’s native platform token, MX, to receive a 20% discount on trading fees. 
  • Hold MX: Hold at least 500 MX within 24 hours to receive a 50% discount on spot and futures fees. 
  • Popular trading pairs: Some popular trading pairs, such as XRP/USDT and XRP/USDC, have a 0% spot transaction fee.

What Are the MEXC Restricted Countries?

MEXC Exchange is not available everywhere. It is not accessible to traders in North Korea, Cuba, Sudan, Syria, Hong Kong, Iran, Mainland China, Singapore, the United States, the United Kingdom, Canada, Sevastopol and Russian-controlled regions of Ukraine (Crimea, Donetsk, and Luhansk).

Due to legal and regulatory restrictions, you cannot open an account or trade on MEXC Exchange if you are located in one of these regions. However, some traders use VPN to bypass detection and access MEXC services. They remain “Unverified” traders with a daily withdrawal limit starting at 10 BTC.

Always remember that MEXC reserves the right to take immediate action, including account liquidation and termination (even funded accounts) if users provide inconsistent information about their location. So, if you decide to use a VPN, ensure it is always on while logging in to the platform.

Is MEXC Safe and Legit to Buy and Sell Crypto?

Yes, MEXC is safe and legit to buy and sell crypto. The platform has been operating since 2018 and has never been hacked or lost user funds. They secure user funds using robust security features like cold wallet storage, multi-sig authorizations, and advanced encryption.

Still, there have been complaints about MEXC locking user funds and delisting tokens without warning. A user claimed that “They banned the account and my team members’ account also. We have more than 50 Dollars on our account. When we contacted them individually they asked me to submit the holding NID and a paper where we write “MEXC Account” and E-mail or UID…”

“…And they list coins randomly and most of them are Honeypot coins. As like GEGS, NGH, Wifceo, LAG etc(Delisted). They are listing honeypot coins and wiping the customers’ funds…”

While some of these complaints are unverified and not settled, MEXC has advanced security protocols in place. They also released a statement when another user allegedly lost over $92k due to account freeze. MEXC acknowledged that there was an abnormal cryptocurrency trading activity in the users account saying;

“Regarding the account restrictions and issues related to futures trading/assets that you have raised, our risk control system and relevant personnel have conducted a thorough examination. It has been identified that there have been abnormal trading activities in your account and associated accounts. In accordance with the terms of use, we have taken measures to recover the losses incurred.”

Another potential concern could be that MEXC is unregulated in most jurisdictions, including the United States, North Korea, Mainland China, and Canada. Nevertheless, this case is no different than other top exchanges in the space facing regulatory challenges in similar regions like Binance and Bybit.

But if you are still concerned about the safety of your digital assets, you can easily take security a step further. Secure your account with two-factor authentication (2FA), address whitelisting for crypto withdrawals, or even complete Advanced KYC if you are a resident of a MEXC-supported country.

Does MEXC Require KYC to Withdraw?

No, MEXC allows users to withdraw without KYC. However, your daily withdrawal limit as an Unverified user is the equivalent of 10 BTC.

What is the MEXC Withdrawal Limit Without KYC?

Without KYC verification, MEXC imposes a withdrawal limit of 10 BTC every 24 hours. You can increase your withdrawal limit by completing either Primary or Advanced KYC. Primary KYC allows withdrawals of up to 80 BTC within 24 hours, while Advanced KYC increases this limit to 200 BTC and includes additional features like OTC trading.

Is MEXC Exchange Banned In India?

Yes, MEXC Exchange is currently restricted in India. In late 2023, it was flagged by the Financial Intelligence Unit (FIU) for non-compliance with anti-money laundering laws. However, Indian users can still reach the exchange via mexc.co.
